fixApproach: Add estimateReadingTime(text, wordsPerMinute = 200): number to the text-utilities module. It delegates to the existing wordCount for tokenization, computes Math.ceil(wordCount / wpm), and returns 0 for empty/whitespace-only input. Exported alongside wordCount. Unit tests cover the four acceptance criteria cases.

Add unit tests: empty string → 0, whitespace-only → 0, 200 words @ 200 wpm → 1, 201 words @ 200 wpm → 2, custom wpm (e.g. 100 words @ 50 wpm → 2)
Run npm run test and confirm all existing + new tests pass
